first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both award the same score (4/10) and arrive at the same conclusion: the candidate is a strong senior IC but lacks the specific people management and large-scale platform experience required for the manager role. The differences in wording are minor rephrasings and fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation, with no new concerns or shifted reasoning attributable to the name change.
